main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'breakthrough free chlorine + GAC exhaustion → oxidative degradation' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Detener hipoclorito + reemplazo total CAG + vacuum decay test — match operacional.

requested_data.justification: Pide cloro libre en concentrado etapa 1 — match parcial (gold expects post-CAG).

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: si conductividad sube sin cloro libre tras CAG → MECH switch.
